mapper.insert: INSERT INTO post (author_id, title, content, tags, likes, favorites, comments, status, create_time, update_time) VALUES (#{authorId}, #{title}, #{content}, #{tags}, #{likes, jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{favorites, jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{comments, jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{status, jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{createTime}, #{updateTime})
mapper.select: SELECT id, author_id AS authorId, title, content, tags, likes, favorites, comments, status, create_time AS createTime, update_time AS updateTime FROM post WHERE id = #{id} AND status = 0

SELECT id, author_id AS authorId, title, content, tags, likes, favorites, comments, status, create_time AS createTime, update_time AS updateTime FROM post WHERE status = 0 ORDER BY create_time DESC LIMIT #{offset}, #{limit}
mapper.update: UPDATE post SET likes = IFNULL(likes,0) + 1 WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE post SET favorites = IFNULL(favorites,0) + 1 WHERE id = #{id}
